calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2013 Continued To Jan-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

A dismissal was faxed to the Probate Examiner but not filed. The accounting petition was continued to January 22, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the dismissal.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Dec-05-2012 Continued To Jan-08-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Dismissal
Off Calendar Nov-05-2012 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Nov-05-2012 Continued To Dec-05-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Sep-24-2012 Continued To Nov-05-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen Lightfoot for Respondent. William Taylor for Trustee.

Mr. Lightfoot stated that they resolved the matter over the weekend, that the settlement will not need Court approval and that they will file a dismissal. The accounting petition was continued to November 5, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of the dismissal was also set for that date.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Aug-13-2012 Continued To Sep-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Response To Demand For Production Of Documents, 1st Set, Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories, 1st Set, And Request For Admissions, 1st Set, And Imposing Monetary Sanction, And Removing Trustee, Supporting Declaration Of William Taylor
Off Calendar Apr-30-2012 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Apr-30-2012 Continued To Aug-13-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Taylor for Loni Bates and Marva Canada. Stephen Lighfoot for Lawrence Martin, Jr.

The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than July 30, 2012. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by August 7, 2012. The Accounting Petition was continued to and the Parties are to return on August 13, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The Motion to Compel Further Response To The Demand For Production of Documents, etc. on calendar for May 3, 2012 was taken off calendar at Mr. Taylor's reqeust.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Mar-26-2012 Continued To Apr-30-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen Lightfoot for and with Lawrence Martin, Jr. (Respondent). William Taylor for Marva Canada and Loni Williams (Objectors).

Mr. Lightfoot stated that he will file his response to the objections this week. The Accounting Petition was continued to April 30, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Continued To Mar-26-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Continued To Feb-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Taylor for and with Marva Canada and for Loni Williams (Objectors). Stephen Lightfoot for Lawrence Martin (Trustee).

The Petition for Removal of Trustee is denied without prejudice. The Accouting Petition was continued to February 27, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to deal with objections.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, And For Relief Under Probate Code 17200 Et Seq
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Denied

Petition To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, And For Relief Under Probate Code 17200 Et Seq
Off Calendar Oct-24-2011 Continued To Dec-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Taylor for Loni Williams and Marva Canada (Petitioners). Stephen Lightfoot II for and with Lawrence Martin (Respondent).

The matter was continued to December 19, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to be heard with the accounting petition.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.

Petition To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, And For Relief Under Probate Code 17200 Et Seq
Off Calendar Sep-26-2011 Continued To Oct-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, And For Relief Under Probate Code 17200 Et Seq
Off Calendar Aug-15-2011 Continued To Sep-26-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen Lightfoot for Lawrence Martin. William Taylor for and with Loni Williams and for Marva Canada.

Mr. Lightfoot stated that he will provide Mr. Taylor with an accounting. The Petition to Remove Trustee, etc. was continued to September 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The account will run as of the date of death. Counsel are to meet and confer prior to the next hearing date. The Court advised Counsel to communicate with each other so that the matter can be resolved as expeditiously as possible.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

Petition To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, And For Relief Under Probate Code 17200 Et Seq
Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Continued To Aug-15-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
